- **Tipo:** PDF

---

What you’ll need to run a giveaway:
A dedicated list in Klaviyo
A flow in Klaviyo triggered by the list
3-4 Emails for the flow
TY Landing page page
Giveaway opt-in Landing Page
More Chances Landing page
A Rules Page
Social Posts announcing the giveaway (IG, FB, YT etc.)
A Winners email
A Non-Winners Email
Winner social posts
www.getwsodo.com

You’re entered to win!
Meta Description
Fantastic! You’re entered to win $100 in free Boom. Want more chances to win? Check
out this page for details.
Fantastic! You’re Entered to Win
$100 in Free Boom!
You’re officially entered to win $100 to spend in our Boom store. We’ll announce
our five winners later this month.
In the meantime, want to increase your odds of winning? Here’s how it works...
We select our winners at random through email, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube and
text. The more ways you enter, the more chances you have to win.
Entering again is easy…
⛱ Post a comment on the giveaway post on our Facebook page and tell us:
What’s your favorite Boom and why? (Or if you’re new to Boom, what are you excited to
try first?) Tag at least one friend in your comment. (Worth one entry)
⛱ Post a comment on the giveaway post on our Instagram page and tell us:
Which Boom have you NOT tried yet, but you’d like to try it next? (Or if you’ve tried
every Boom, which do you love most?) Again, tag at least one friend in your comment!
(Worth one entry)
www.getwsodo.com

Of course, this discount applies to anything in our store. Here’s how you might use it...
(Bright image with model)
Love Boom Bright? Grab one at a discount.
“Best mascara ever!”—Diane F., Boom Bright customer
We carefully designed every detail of this mascara for lashes after 50. With its gentle,
hypoallergenic formula, Boom Bright™ defines, lengthens and even moisturizes your
lashes—all without running, smearing or clumping.
(Gloss image with model)
New: Try our brand-new lip gloss for less.
“I love the moisturizing, luxurious feel of Boom Gloss!”—Catherine E., Boom Gloss
customer
Made exclusively for your 50s+, Boom Gloss™ gives your lips a subtle, elegant
shine—without the stickiness. This ultra-hydrating gloss leaves your lips feeling soft and
beautiful every time you apply it.
(Boomstick image with model)
Boomsticks: Save on the original Boom favorites.
“Perfection. I had nothing but compliments.”—Marie H., Boomstick Trio customer
Three sticks. Five minutes. One natural look. That’s what Boomsticks can do for you.
After 40,000 five-star reviews, the Boomstick Trio™ remains the #1 uncontested favorite
in our store.
If you’ve never tried our Trio, this is your chance to add Boomstick Color™, Boomstick
Glimmer™ and Boomstick Glo™ to your makeup bag at a discount.
Try anything in our store for 10% off during this giveaway. Click below to shop now.
